details.test: Task 1: Save highest-rated Saturday clinic with abortion counseling near 10001
Task 2: Register for two events next month with combined duration under 5 hours
Task 3: Split donation between reproductive justice and gender pay equity campaigns
Task 4: Sign two petitions on abortion access (adapted for available data)
Task 5: Create advocacy toolkit with at least 3 items
Task 6: Contact representative with strongest pro-choice template for ZIP 30301
Task 7: Bookmark most recently updated short explainer/article (fallback for family leave)
Task 8: Add two remote volunteer roles under 3 hours/week to volunteer plan
Task 9: Build 4-article reading list with intersectional feminism and trans healthcare (adapted)
